sentence: 他们俩有很多共同点，相处融洽。
pinyin: Tāmen liǎ yǒu hěn duō gòngtóngdiǎn, xiāngchǔ róngqià.
english: The two of them have a lot in common and get along very well.

sentence: 他把笔记本电脑放在桌上。
pinyin: Tā bǎ bǐjìběn diànnǎo fàng zài zhuō shàng.
english: He put his laptop on the desk.

sentence: 老师讲解了这种句式的用法。
pinyin: Lǎoshī jiǎngjiě le zhè zhǒng jùshì de yòngfǎ.
english: The teacher explained the usage of this sentence pattern.

sentence: 他每天走小巷捷径去上班。
pinyin: Tā měitiān zǒu xiǎoxiàng jiéjìng qù shàngbān.
english: He takes the alley shortcut to work every day.
